objective:
Sur le marché 0GUSDC en 1h, la stratégie se concentre sur les familles robustes de breakouts et de momentum avec une combinaison innovante d'EMA + OBV pour l'analyse des mouvements, et EMA combinée à STOCHASTIC pour le contraste. L'objectif est d'explorer un comportement aleatoire qui demanderait la confirmation partielle contraire sur RSI pour augmenter l'originalite, tout en s'assurant que la gestion du risque et l'asymetrie long/court sont respectées dans le contexte de volatilité variable.

[Style] Sur le marché 0GUSDC en 1h. Indicateurs : EMA + OBV + STOCHASTIC. Entrées : RSI<30 (confirmation partielle contraire), AROON, adx avec angule de nouveauté deja prometteur; Sorties: Breakout sur les valeurs hautes et basse historiques. Risk management : SL/TP en fonction de la volatilité.

L'objectif est d'explorer une stratégie qui combine des familles robustes de breakouts, momentum avec la créativité pour tester un nouvel angle avec l'AROON et adx

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy focuses on robust breakout and momentum strategies combined with EMA, OBV, and STOCHASTIC for analysis of price movements. It also incorporates AROON and ADX to generate a new perspective. The risk management includes stop loss (SL) and take profit (TP) based on volatility. If the SL/TP is not exploitable due to low volatility, an automatic fallback contract will be generated to maintain progression. In case of poor results, it can be improved by adjusting entry conditions or parameters such as RSI values.
[Backup plan] 1. Adjusting entry conditions and parameters like RSI value for better performance.2. Implementing stop loss management based on market volatility3. Using a different strategy if the current one fails

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The proposed strategy combines Bollinger breakout with ADX trend filter and RSI to identify potential breakouts. The hypothesis is that this combination reduces false signals in ranging markets. The current backtest run has been running since iteration 3, but the results are not yet known.
[Backup plan] [{'Iteration': '7/10', 'Weaknesses': ['The strategy relies on the assumption of trending market conditions which may limit its effectiveness in ranging markets.', 'The use of RSI with Bollinger breakout might lead to overtrading during high volatility periods.']}, {'Iteration': '8/10', 'Change if Results are Poor (negative return)': ['Examine whether changes such as adjusting the filter parameters for ADX and bollinger can improve performance.'], 'Backup Plan': ['Test other strategies that might be more robust in ranging markets, or consider incorporating a volatility-based filter to reduce false signals.']}, {'Iteration': '9/10', 'Change if Results are Mediocre (low Sharpe)': ['Experiment with different settings for RSI and Bollinger breakout parameters, such as changing the period of the Bollinger bands. This could potentially increase the performance.'], 'Backup Plan': ['Test other strategies that might be more effective at capturing trends or consolidations in price action.']}, {'Iteration': '10/10', 'Alternative Approach if Current One Fails': ['Consider testing a mean reversion strategy, such as a trading rule based on the ATR envelope. This approach could potentially identify reversal points when prices move out of their typical ranges.']}]
